demographic_profile.summary: This demographic consists of people who experience the same problems repeatedly due to behavioral patterns, lifestyle factors, or circumstances beyond their control. They are motivated by frustration with recurring issues and desperately seek products that will either solve their problems permanently or make dealing with repeat occurrences easier. Their purchase decisions are driven by the hope that this time they've found the right solution to break their cycle of problems.
